summary: Matched vi cutscene function fn_8031EFE4 in src/melee/vi/vi0801.c and updated its header prototype from placeholder UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void fn_8031EFE4(HSD_GObj*). The function gets a camera object from the GObj, advances CObj animation, triggers vi_8031C9B4 at animation frames 1.0/30.0 and 60.0, then calls lb_800145F4 and gm_801A4B60 when the animation reaches end_frame. Bot report records one new 100% match and .sdata2 improvement for main/melee/vi/vi0801.

key_files.role: Replaced placeholder comment for fn_8031EFE4 with matched C implementation and added required gm, lb, and baselib includes.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report 1 new match

key_files.role: Updated fn_8031EFE4 declaration from unknown placeholder signature to void fn_8031EFE4(HSD_GObj*) and included baselib forward declarations.

what_changed.text: Implemented fn_8031EFE4(HSD_GObj* gobj) in vi0801.c, replacing the placeholder /// #fn_8031EFE4.

The implementation uses GET_COBJ(gobj), calls HSD_CObjAnim(cobj), checks cobj->aobj->curr_frame against 1.0F, 30.0F, 60.0F, and end_frame, then calls vi_8031C9B4, lb_800145F4, and gm_801A4B60 on those frame conditions.
Added includes for gm/gm_unsplit.h, lb/lb_00F9.h, baselib/aobj.h, baselib/cobj.h, and baselib/gobj.h in vi0801.c.
Added <baselib/forward.h> to vi0801.h and changed fn_8031EFE4 prototype from UNK_RET fn_8031EFE4(UNK_PARAMS) to void fn_8031EFE4(HSD_GObj*).

PR body claims fn_8031EFE4 reached 100% and vi0801 .sdata2 improved from 0 to 38.89%; bot report records +152 bytes for fn_8031EFE4 from 0.00% to 100.00% and +9 bytes for .sdata2 from 0.00% to 38.89%.

smart_moves.text: Recovered the function signature in the owning header alongside the implementation, avoiding a stale UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declaration.
Used typed baselib CObj/AObj access through HSD_GObj, GET_COBJ, and cobj->aobj fields rather than raw pointer offsets in the submitted source.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a matched function proves its argument and return types, update the corresponding header prototype in the same PR rather than leaving placeholder UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
scope: function declarations recovered by decomp matching
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_8031EFE4 prototype changed to void fn_8031EFE4(HSD_GObj*)

decomp_lessons.lesson: For HSD camera animation callbacks, typed CObj/AObj field access can express frame-triggered behavior cleanly: get the CObj from the GObj, call HSD_CObjAnim, then branch on curr_frame/end_frame.

naming_conventions.name: fn_8031EFE4
naming_conventions.lesson: The PR preserved the address-style function name while recovering its body and type; no semantic rename was introduced.

naming_conventions.name: gobj, cobj
naming_conventions.lesson: Short local role names were used for clear HSD object roles.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use exact float frame literals and direct field comparisons for animation-frame dispatch.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The matched function compares curr_frame to 1.0F, 30.0F, 60.0F, and end_frame to trigger cutscene side effects.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Bring in minimal headers needed for recovered calls and types.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The C file includes gm_unsplit, lb_00F9, and baselib aobj/cobj/gobj; the header includes baselib/forward.h for HSD_GObj.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: include additions in vi0801.c and vi0801.h

notes: No human review comments are present in the loaded slice; review feedback is limited to the automated decomp-dev report.
The slice provides no build log beyond the bot match report, so validation details are recorded only as reported percentages and bytes.
No intent is inferred for the .sdata2 improvement beyond the PR body and bot report.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover headers when a matched body proves the signature
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2054 matched fn_8031EFE4 and updated vi0801.h from UNK_RET fn_8031EFE4(UNK_PARAMS) to void fn_8031EFE4(HSD_GObj*), with <baselib/forward.h> added for the type. This is a concrete example of keeping the owning header truthful after a function body is recovered.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed CObj/AObj frame checks in vi cutscene function
accepted_candidate_records.text: fn_8031EFE4 shows a matched vi cutscene callback using HSD_GObj -> HSD_CObj via GET_COBJ, HSD_CObjAnim, and typed aobj curr_frame/end_frame checks to trigger vi, lb, and gm calls.

rejection_notes: Do not promote a new global standard from this PR alone; the relevant header and typed-field practices are already covered by loaded standards.
Do not infer semantic meaning for fn_8031EFE4 beyond its observed frame-triggered cutscene behavior; the PR retained the address-style name.
Do not treat the .sdata2 percentage improvement as evidence of deliberate data-ownership work; the diff only shows code/header changes and the bot report percentage.
